title: The Crew Prepares to Leave
description: On pages 5–9, this part focuses on the crew prepares to leave, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Prepares to Leave. Kureha hides her feelings behind cruelty, pushing Chopper toward the sea and the life Hiriluk wanted for him. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: ...! Because you're a pirate, you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: me being a king has nothing to do with it!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Mahahaha... You couldn't be more wrong, strawhat!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Drum Kingdom is... nghh! a men..., her state of the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, and I'm saying even that doesn't matter...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 'Cause this is my fight.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You... Stupid Straw- Hippo!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I'll destroy you!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: NGH!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nishi shish!! Eat me if you can!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm not done yet! Baku Baku shook!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Tongue cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: His tongue became,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DIEEE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have to... bring an end to this country...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is a country's history good for...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kindness is unnecessary in matters of governance!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The important thing is sticking to the system!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Please stop! I still have countless patients to treat here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: throw him out to sea! If he keeps on resisting, you can kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let go of me!

summary: This part highlights the crew prepares to leave and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
